bird.name: Hepatic tanager
bird.summary: The hepatic tanager (Piranga hepatica) is a medium-sized American songbird. Formerly placed in the tanager family (Thraupidae), it and othe…

relations.subject: Hepatic tanager
relations.evidence: Hepatic tanager is found in open mountain forests with pine or pine and oak. There it is seen jumping slowly upwards in trees and bushes in search of food, but can also catch flying insects by lunging
relations.object_summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。
